---
title: "Jeffrey S. Racine Research"
bibliography: references.bib
---

::: {.research-hero}
Pointers, companion materials, and software links for nonparametric econometrics, reproducible econometrics, semiparametric methods, and the R packages that support this work.
:::

::: {.quick-note}
This auxiliary site complements my [McMaster profile](https://experts.mcmaster.ca/display/racinej). For working examples and current package-oriented code, see the [Gallery of Code](https://jeffreyracine.github.io/gallery/).
:::

## At A Glance

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.home-card}
### Books

Companion pointers for the Cambridge, Oxford, and Princeton books, including errata, public code archives, tables of contents, and instructor-material notes.

[Books and monographs](books.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.home-card}
### Research Contributions Map

A guide to how the books, articles, examples, and R packages fit together across kernel methods, splines, mixed data, and reproducible computation.

[Research contributions map](corpus.qmd)
:::
:::
::::

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="33%"}
::: {.home-card}
### Reader Pathways

Short routes through the corpus for students, instructors, applied researchers, package users, and method developers.

[Reader pathways](pathways.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
::: {.home-card}
### Software

Current links for `np`, `npRmpi`, `crs`, and legacy package materials, with CRAN, GitHub, manuals, vignettes, and review articles.

[R packages](software.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
::: {.home-card}
### Teaching

Public downloads and a clear note on instructor-only materials for adopted courses, without mixing private course files into the public site.

[Teaching materials](teaching.qmd)
:::
:::
::::

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.home-card}
### Downloads

Local PDFs, code archives, errata, manuals, and teaching-adjacent resources gathered from the older research page.

[Downloads and teaching](resources.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.home-card}
### Gallery

The Gallery is the code-first companion for worked examples, package-oriented snippets, and current usage notes.

[Gallery of Code](https://jeffreyracine.github.io/gallery/)
:::
:::
::::

## Research Thread

Much of the material collected here is tied to three overlapping themes:

- nonparametric and semiparametric econometric methods for mixed continuous and categorical data;
- reproducible computational econometrics in R, from core R workflows to robust inference and time series;
- software implementation, documentation, and applied workflows around `np`, `npRmpi`, and `crs`.

The companion [Gallery of Code](https://jeffreyracine.github.io/gallery/) is the practical example layer. This research site is the bibliographic and resource layer: book links, package references, auxiliary downloads, and durable pointers.

## Navigation Guidance

Start with [Reader Pathways](pathways.qmd) if you want a guided route by audience. Use [Books and Monographs](books.qmd) if you are looking for a publication or companion file. Use the [Research Contributions Map](corpus.qmd) if you want to know which book or package is closest to a topic. Use [R Packages](software.qmd) for software entry points, current package versions, manuals, vignettes, and source repositories.

## Core References

- Racine, J.S. [-@racine_cambridge_2019], *An Introduction to the Advanced Theory and Practice of Nonparametric Econometrics: A Replicable Approach Using R*.
- Racine, J.S. [-@racine_oxford_2019], *Reproducible Econometrics Using R*.
- Li, Q. and J.S. Racine [-@li_racine_2007], *Nonparametric Econometrics: Theory and Practice*.
- Hayfield, T. and J.S. Racine [-@np], "Nonparametric Econometrics: The `np` Package."
- Nie, Z. and J.S. Racine [-@Nie2012TheCP], "The `crs` Package: Nonparametric Regression Splines for Continuous and Categorical Predictors."

## Quick Links

| Destination | Link |
|---|---|
| McMaster profile | [experts.mcmaster.ca/display/racinej](https://experts.mcmaster.ca/display/racinej) |
| Gallery of Code | [jeffreyracine.github.io/gallery](https://jeffreyracine.github.io/gallery/) |
| `np` on CRAN | [cran.r-project.org/package=np](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/np/index.html) |
| `npRmpi` on CRAN | [cran.r-project.org/package=npRmpi](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/npRmpi/index.html) |
| `crs` on CRAN | [cran.r-project.org/package=crs](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/crs/index.html) |
| Package source | [github.com/JeffreyRacine/R-Package-np](https://github.com/JeffreyRacine/R-Package-np/) |
